content.problemStatement:
Chef is operating a slush machine. The machine produces slush drinks with MMM flavors (numbered 111 through MMM); for each valid iii, the maximum number of drinks with flavour iii the machine can produce is CiC_iCi​.

Chef expects NNN customers to come buy slush drinks today. The customers are numbered 111 through NNN in the order in which they buy the drinks. For each valid iii, the favorite flavour of the iii-th customer is DiD_iDi​ and this customer is willing to pay FiF_iFi​ units of money for a drink with this flavour, or BiB_iBi​ units of money for a drink with any other flavuor. Whenever a customer wants to buy a drink:


if it is possible to sell this customer a drink with their favourite flavour, Chef must sell them a drink with this flavour
otherwise, Chef must sell this customer a drink, but he may choose its flavour
Chef wants to make the maximum possible profit. He is asking you to help him decide the flavours of the drinks he should sell to the customers in order to maximise the profit.
constraints: 1≤Di≤M1 \le D_i \le M1≤Di​≤M for each valid iii
1≤Ci≤N1 \le C_i \le N1≤Ci​≤N for each valid iii
1≤Bi<Fi≤1091 \le B_i \lt F_i \le 10^91≤Bi​<Fi​≤109 for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and MMM.
The second line contains MMM space-separated integers C1,C2,…,CMC_1, C_2, \ldots, C_MC1​,C2​,…,CM​.
NNN lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains three space-separated integers DiD_iDi​, FiF_iFi​ and BiB_iBi​.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case, print two lines:


The first of these lines should contain a single integer — the maximum profit.
The second line should contain NNN space-separated integers denoting the flavours of the drinks Chef should sell, in this order.
If there are multiple solutions, you may find any one.
